story.title: Story
story.name: Miguel Espinosa a.k.a. Spin
story.bio_1: DJ and sound curator with over 20 years in electronic music. He moves between house, deep and progressive, always looking for the sound to tell a story.
story.bio_2: From Bogotá, he's built a career on elegant, carefully curated sets, playing the clubs and festivals that matter in Colombia.
story.bio_3: His sound has deep layers, hypnotic progressions and a selection that connects with the dance floor on a visceral level.
